Swan Song by Regionally Famous
System core by Robert Peip
Pocket port by agg23

Supported launch path:
* SD-card games through openFPGA
* WonderSwan .ws and WonderSwan Color .wsc
* User-supplied 4 KiB bw.rom and 8 KiB color.rom
* Last-game reuse is configured; Pocket verification pending
* Pocket firmware 2.3 minimum; 2.6.0 recommended

PocketChallenge v2 and .pc2 assets are not supported.
The physical cartridge and link ports are not used.

Features:
* Fast Forward and CPU Turbo
* Console Setup invokes the original BIOS setup gesture
* Automatic, horizontal, or vertical display orientation
* Optional landscape 180-degree presentation
* Triple-buffered video and optional LCD response effects
* Raw RGB444 and optional Color LCD (ares) profile

The game's native orientation still controls its button matrix.
Display Orientation and Landscape 180 degrees affect presentation only.

Memories and Sleep + Wake remain disabled pending end-to-end Pocket validation.

Controls and Dock:
* Pocket and Dock use the same Player 1 digital mapping
* Controllers 2-4, analog axes, keyboard, and mouse are not used
* Controls behavior is PocketOS-owned; verify on 2.6.0
* Vertical games use D-pad for Y and face buttons for X
